description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in this stage. The job should export IMAGE_TAG by sanitizing CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, log in to the GitLab Container Registry using the CI_JOB_TOKEN, build the Docker image with --pull and tag it as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG, then push the image to the registry. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
